issue_prompt: TRUE chunky pixel-art ability icon only, exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large. War Hymn: a stout ceremonial bell crossed by two rising musical strokes and a small party-chevron base, clearly an inspiring group buff. Use brass gold, crimson cloth accent, cream highlight, deep blue-violet shadow; source-local colors without themed palette restriction. Solid #ff00ff background only. No singer, written notes or letters, UI frame, room, shadow, soft aura, confetti, gradient, anti-aliasing, blur, dithering, watermark, or transparency.
